github.note: PR, issues, code search — dùng mọi project

context7.note: Docs lookup theo version — thay thế paste docs vào chat

figma.note: Pull design → code — dùng khi có Figma URL

postman.note: API collection, spec gen — dùng khi build API

supabase.note: DB queries, migrations — project dùng Supabase

prisma.note: Schema management — project dùng Prisma ORM

linear.note: Issue tracking — sync task với Linear board

typescript-lsp.note: Type queries, go-to-definition — thay vì Read full file

jdtls-lsp.note: Java class hierarchy, method signatures — Spring Boot. Requires JDK 17+ installed.
jdtls-lsp.install_prereq: JDK 17+ must be on PATH. Run: winget install Microsoft.OpenJDK.17
